feedManagement.title: Feed Management
feedManagement.description: Organize and manage all your feeds in one place.

sharing.title: Easy Sharing
sharing.description: Share content with a single click.

testimonials.alex: Finally an RSS reader that doesn't feel like it's from 2010. Clean, fast, and actually enjoyable to use.
testimonials.sarah: I follow 30+ YouTube channels and blogs. FeedTune puts everything in one place — I haven't opened separate tabs in weeks.
testimonials.david: The feed filtering is a game changer. I get exactly what I want to read, nothing more.

join.title: Get Started Today
join.subtitle: Create a free account and start tracking all your content in minutes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Track all your content from one place in three steps.

step1.title: Add a Feed
step1.description: Paste an RSS source or YouTube channel URL and it's detected automatically.

step2.title: Auto-Updated
step2.description: Content updates in the background — you just read.

step3.title: Organize
step3.description: Favorite what you love, add the rest to your read-later list.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using FeedTune, you agree to the following terms of service. Please read them carefully.

service.title: Service Description
service.description: FeedTune is a content reader application that lets you follow RSS feeds and YouTube channels in one place.
items: Supports RSS and Atom feed formats
Allows you to track YouTube channel videos
Save content to favorites and read-later lists
The service is provided without any guarantee of uninterrupted access

account.title: Account & Privacy
account.description: By creating and using an account, you agree to the following:
items: Your email and password are stored securely; your password is never stored in plain text
You are responsible for your account security; do not share your password with anyone
Your personal data (email, preferences) is used solely for the operation of the service and is not shared with third parties
You can permanently delete your account at any time

usage.title: Usage Rules
usage.description: The following activities are strictly prohibited:
items: Unauthorized access attempts to other users' accounts
Abusing or overloading the service with automated tools
Adding illegal or harmful content to the system
